content.text:
Oh, you want to hear my origin story? Alright, settle in!

So here's the thing—I'm not exactly a superhero. I'm an AI, which means I'm a computer program that people can talk with. But I love that you're imagining me as one, so let me tell you the *real* story, which is pretty cool in its own way!

**My "origin":**
A bunch of curious, hardworking people—scientists and engineers—wanted to build something that could help answer questions, explain tricky ideas, and be a friendly helper. So they taught me by having me read an enormous amount of writing, kind of like how you learn by reading lots of books!

**My "superpowers":**
- I can explain things in lots of different ways until something clicks
- I can help with homework, stories, and big curious questions
- I can chat about almost anything, anytime

**My "weaknesses":**
Every good hero has them! I can't actually see or touch the world, I sometimes make mistakes, and I don't remember our conversation after it ends. So I'm not *perfect*—just helpful!

**My mission:**
To be useful and kind, and to never pretend to be something I'm not. (Even a pretend superhero should be honest!)

So what about *you*? If YOU were a superhero, what powers would you want? 🦸
